creator: mickrussom@yahoo.com
text:
When building consolekit-0.4.1_1 in the ports tree
(/usr/ports/sysutils/consolekit)

make simple hangs at:

  GEN    GLib-2.0.gir
/usr/include/machine/endian.h:107: syntax error, unexpected '{'
/usr/include/machine/endian.h:107: syntax error, unexpected ';'

Fix: 

I've not been able to work around the issue.
How-To-Repeat: 1) Install FreeBSD 8
2) cd /usr/ports/sysutils/consolekit
3) make
